'''Kerensik''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DES" /> located in the [[Kerensik system/Legends|Kerensik system]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Southern Core]] portion of<ref name="TEA Kerensik" /> the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Kerensik was a part of<ref name="EAOC" /> the [[Allied Region]] known as the [[Botor Enclave/Legends|Botor Enclave]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

Kerensik was a frozen world, with [[Winter/Legends|winter]] being the only season on the planet. Kerensiki [[Tree/Legends|trees]] featured spines which were very dissimilar to the leaves of trees from other worlds. [[Kane Griggs]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] and [[Homeworld/Legends|raised]] on Kerensik.<ref name="DES" />

[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] before the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] of the planet [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]<ref name="DES" /> in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Griggs left Kerensik for the first [[Time/Legends|time]] and traveled to another world, where he enrolled in a [[Politics/Legends|political]] studies course at an Imperial [[University/Legends|university]]. On that world, Griggs was amazed at the difference between the [[Autumn/Legends|autumn]] season and his native Kerensik.<ref name="DES" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|struggle]] between the Empire and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the Botor Enclave declared its independence,<ref name="TEA" /> and its member worlds, including Kerensik, formed a protective federation of its own.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kerensik was first mentioned in the [[1993]] ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'', which was authored by [[Michael Allen Horne]] and published by [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="DES" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Kerensik [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square K-12.<ref name="TEA" />
